description_long: This bird has a streamlined body with dark brown to black plumage covering its back, wings, and head, while the underparts are lighter, showing a white or pale gray coloration. The beak is long, straight, and orange with a slightly darker tip, well-suited for probing or picking. The eyes are small and positioned laterally, giving the bird a keen, alert expression. The wings are elongated and closely held to the body, and the tail is short and appears slightly rounded at the end. The legs are not clearly visible in these views, but the overall body proportions suggest a wader or shorebird type. The surface texture of the feathers appears matte with a subtle sheen, and the bird's form is slender and agile.
description: A slender, dark-plumaged bird with a long orange beak and lighter underparts, featuring a streamlined body and short, rounded tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, dark upperparts, and long orange beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail and the symmetry of the wings folded along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the long beak, dark back, and pale underside.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the straight, pointed beak and the narrow profile of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark upperparts with white underparts and subtle gradient transitions
